falsification_conditions.condition: The price breaks above the previous all-time high (ATH) by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above the ATH would contradict the blowoff pattern and indicate continued bullish momentum, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume increases by 50% above the 20-day moving average average, with no corresponding price decline
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high volume without price collapse would indicate strong buying pressure, refuting the blowoff scenario and invalidating the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price remains above the 200-day moving average (a key support level) for the entire 14-day period
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Holding the 200-day MA would indicate a lack of bearish momentum, directly contradicting the blowoff pattern and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
